question: Will the Federal Reserve cut the federal funds target rate at its June 2026 FOMC meeting?
resolution_criteria: Resolves YES if the FOMC's June 2026 statement announces a reduction in the target range for the federal funds rate versus the prior meeting; an unchanged or increased range resolves NO.
background: As of 2026-05-20, replace this text with the real, publicly-known facts a well-informed observer would have on that date: recent CPI/PCE inflation prints, the labor market, the most recent FOMC decision and dot plot, notable speeches by voting members, and market pricing. The simulator treats this as sealed, time-locked evidence (no live retrieval), so only include what was knowable on or before as_of.
note: Example only — fill in a real as-of background before recording.
